falsification_conditions.condition: The price increases by 15% or more within the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and suggest a blowoff top is forming, invalidating the current UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 20-day average volume for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate strong buying pressure, refuting the pattern's expectation of a consolidation or reversal phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above the 2022 May Luna peak (3,450.00) by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above a historically significant resistance level would invalidate the pattern's similarity to a prior bottom and suggest a new bullish trend.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
